uplink.description: Battery, soil temperature & moisture (recovers the soil.temperature the upstream codec omits)
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder for the channels it handles (battery=92, moisture byte 101/2=50.5); soil.temperature (0x03/0x67 signed int16 LE /10 = 308/10) is authored to the family-standard wire format since the upstream EM500-SMT decoder has no temperature handler.
expected derived from upstream TTN decoder for battery (80) and moisture (40/2=20); soil.temperature 0xFFF1 = -15 -> -1.5 degC authored to the family-standard wire format.

uplink.description: Battery and soil moisture only (TTN YAML example bytes)
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder (its YAML example: battery=100, humidity=113/2=56.5); humidity is mapped to soil.moisture.
expected derived from upstream TTN decoder, which produces empty data for an unrecognized leading channel; our codec reports an explicit error instead.
